attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
                        SMVIL.BATCH_ID                      
                       ,SMVIL.INVOICE_ID                    
                       ,SMVIL.LINE_NUMBER                   
                       ,SMVIL.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE         
                       ,SMVIL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               
                       ,SMVIL.AMOUNT                        
                       ,SMVIL.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
                       ,SMVIL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
                       ,SMVIL.DESCRIPTION                   
                       ,SMVIL.LINE_SOURCE                   
                       ,SMVIL.ORG_ID                        
                       ,SMVIL.DISTRIBUTION_SET_ID           
                       ,SMVIL.QUANTITY_INVOICED             
                       ,SMVIL.UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE         
                       ,SMVIL.UNIT_PRICE                    
                       ,SMVIL.ORIGINAL_AMOUNT               
                       ,SMVIL.ORIGINAL_BASE_AMOUNT          
                       ,SMVIL.ORIGINAL_ROUNDING_AMT         
                       ,SMVIL.CANCELLED_FLAG                
                       ,SMVIL.PO_HEADER_ID                  
                       ,SMVIL.PO_LINE_ID                    
                       ,SMVIL.PO_RELEASE_ID                 
                       ,SMVIL.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID           
                       ,SMVIL.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID
					   ,SMVIL.REFERENCE_1                   
                       ,SMVIL.REFERENCE_2                   
                       ,SMVIL.DAILY_AMOUNT                  
                       ,SMVIL.CREATION_DATE                 
                       ,SMVIL.CREATED_BY                    
                       ,SMVIL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             
                       ,SMVIL.CONTROL_AMOUNT                
                       ,SMVIL.ASSESSABLE_VALUE              
                       ,SMVIL.TOTAL_REC_TAX_AMOUNT          
                       ,SMVIL.TOTAL_NREC_TAX_AMOUNT         
                       ,SMVIL.TOTAL_REC_TAX_AMT_FUNCL_CURR  
                       ,SMVIL.TOTAL_NREC_TAX_AMT_FUNCL_CURR 
                       ,SMVIL.INCLUDED_TAX_AMOUNT           
                       ,SMVIL.RCV_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID          
                       ,SMVIL.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
                       ,SMVIL.GLOBAL_NAME                   
                       ,SMVIL.CREATE_DATETIME               
                       ,SMVIL.ACTION_CODE                   
                       ,'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
					   ,SMVIL.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID
					   ,SMVIL.ACCOUNTING_DATE
                      ,SMVIL.REQUESTER_ID  
		FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_INVOICE_LINES_ALL SMVIL
		WHERE
          NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE NVI, 
			                    $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
						WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMVIL.GLOBAL_NAME
							AND NVI.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT=SMVIL.INVOICE_ID
							AND NVI.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
           OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SOURCE_TYPE LINE_SRC
                        WHERE SMVIL.LINE_SOURCE=LINE_SRC.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SRC_TYPE_CD)
		   OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_TYPE LINE_TYPE
                         WHERE SMVIL.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE =LINE_TYPE.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_TYPE_CD)
		   OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCIO
						 WHERE SMVIL.ORG_ID = NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)

SELECT   
RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMAIH.INVOICE_ID,SMAIH.LINE_NUMBER,SMAIH.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) + MAX_VAL VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY,
       SMAIH.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,
       SMAIH.INVOICE_ID AS SK_INVOICE_ID_INT,
       SMAIH.LINE_NUMBER as SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT
  FROM (SELECT ST.INVOICE_ID,ST.LINE_NUMBER, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                  FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_INVOICE_LINES_ALL ST,
              $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
         WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = ST.GLOBAL_NAME
		 UNION ALL
		 SELECT SCAIL.INVOICE_ID,SCAIL.LINE_NUMBER, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
                  FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_AP_INVOICE_LINES_ALL SCAIL,
              $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
         WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SCAIL.GLOBAL_NAME
		 
		 ) SMAIH,
       (SELECT COALESCE (MAX (VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL
          FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE) SVILINE
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (
			          SELECT 1
			            FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE SVIL
			           WHERE SVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT = SMAIH.LINE_NUMBER
				     AND SVIL.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT=SMAIH.INVOICE_ID
			             AND SVIL.SS_CD = SMAIH.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	              )

SELECT 
   SVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY AS  VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY,
   COALESCE(ST.CANCELLED_FLAG,'=') AS VENDOR_INV_LINE_CANCELLED_FLG,	
   'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
   COALESCE(ST.QUANTITY_INVOICED,0) AS VENDOR_INV_LINE_QTY,
   COALESCE(ST.AMOUNT,0) AS VENDOR_INV_LINE_TRXL_AMT,
   ST.DESCRIPTION AS VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_DESCR,
   ST.LINE_NUMBER AS BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT,
   NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD,
   ST.INVOICE_ID AS SK_INVOICE_ID_INT,
   ST.LINE_NUMBER AS SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT,
   NVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY AS VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY,
   COALESCE(LINE_TYPE.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_TYPE_CD,
   COALESCE(LINE_SRC.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SRC_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SRC_TYPE_CD,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
   USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
   USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
/* CHANGES AS PART OF TSP */
(CASE WHEN  NRS.RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY IS NULL THEN 
 CASE 		WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ='MFG' 	THEN 	-99999
 			WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ='EMEA'    THEN 	-99998
 			WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ='BV' 		THEN 	-99997
 			WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ='QTC' 	THEN 	-99996
 END    ELSE  NRS.RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY  END)  AS RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(SRT.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY,-999) AS RECIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY ,
CASE WHEN NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL
THEN
	CASE 	WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ='MFG' 	THEN 	-99999
 			WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ='EMEA' 	THEN 	-99998
 			WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ='BV' 		THEN 	-99997
 			WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ='QTC' 	THEN 	-99996
 END 
ELSE
NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY
END AS PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
/* CHANGES AS PART OF TSP */
COALESCE(CAST(ST.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'),DATE '3500-01-01') AS POSTING_DT, /* pvenketa : 11/17/2014 Added as part of Q2FY15 Dec QWN */
ST.ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE,
 COALESCE (NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY , -999) AS REQUESTOR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY 
   
FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_AP_INVOICE_LINES_ALL ST
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = ST.GLOBAL_NAME
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE NVI
    ON ST.INVOICE_ID=NVI.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT
    AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NVI.SS_CD
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE SVIL
    ON SVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT = ST.LINE_NUMBER
       AND SVIL.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT=ST.INVOICE_ID
        AND SVIL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SOURCE_TYPE LINE_SRC
    ON ST.LINE_SOURCE=LINE_SRC.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SRC_TYPE_CD
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_TYPE LINE_TYPE
    ON ST.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE =LINE_TYPE.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_TYPE_CD
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT  EMPLOYEE_NUMBER , PERSON_ID , GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F) ELP
	ON ELP.PERSON_ID = ST.REQUESTER_ID AND ELP.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BE'
  LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY   NCWP
  ON  ELP.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER = NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID 
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_ITEM  NRS
   ON ST.RCV_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID = NRS.SK_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID_INT 
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  = NRS.SS_CD
/* CHANGES AS PART OF TSP */
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION SRT
	ON SRT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = ST.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SRT.SS_CD
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
ON NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = ST.PO_LINE_ID
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NPOL.SS_CD


UNION ALL
   SELECT 
   SVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY AS  VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY,
   COALESCE(EX.CANCELLED_FLAG,'=') AS VENDOR_INV_LINE_CANCELLED_FLG,
   'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
   COALESCE(EX.QUANTITY_INVOICED,0) AS VENDOR_INV_LINE_QTY,
   COALESCE(EX.AMOUNT,0) AS VENDOR_INV_LINE_TRXL_AMT,
   EX.DESCRIPTION AS VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_DESCR,
   EX.LINE_NUMBER AS BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT,
   NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD,
   EX.INVOICE_ID AS SK_INVOICE_ID_INT,
   EX.LINE_NUMBER AS SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT,
   NVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY AS VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY,
   COALESCE(LINE_TYPE.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_TYPE_CD,
   COALESCE(LINE_SRC.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SRC_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SRC_TYPE_CD,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
   USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
   USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
/* CHANGES AS PART OF TSP */
(CASE WHEN   NRS.RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY IS NULL THEN 
 CASE 		WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ='MFG' 	THEN 	-99999
 			WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ='EMEA'    THEN 	-99998
 			WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ='BV' 		THEN 	-99997
 			WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ='QTC' 	THEN 	-99996
 END    ELSE  NRS.RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY  END)  AS RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(SRT.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY,-999)  AS RECIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY ,
CASE WHEN NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL
THEN
	CASE 	WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ='MFG' 	THEN 	-99999
 			WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ='EMEA' 	THEN 	-99998
 			WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ='BV' 		THEN 	-99997
 			WHEN NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE ='QTC' 	THEN 	-99996
 END 
ELSE
NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY
END AS PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(CAST(EX.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'),DATE '3500-01-01') AS POSTING_DT, /* pvenketa : 11/17/2014 Added as part of Q2FY15 Dec QWN */
EX.ACTION_CODE,
   'I' AS DML_TYPE,
  COALESCE (NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY , -999) AS REQUESTOR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY  
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_AP_INVOICE_LINES EX
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EX.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE NVI
    ON EX.INVOICE_ID=NVI.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT
    AND NSSC. SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NVI.SS_CD
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE SVIL
    ON SVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT = EX.LINE_NUMBER
       AND SVIL.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT=EX.INVOICE_ID
        AND SVIL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SOURCE_TYPE LINE_SRC
    ON EX.LINE_SOURCE=LINE_SRC.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SRC_TYPE_CD
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_TYPE LINE_TYPE
    ON EX.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE =LINE_TYPE.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_TYPE_CD
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT  EMPLOYEE_NUMBER , PERSON_ID , GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F) ELP
	ON ELP.PERSON_ID = EX.REQUESTER_ID AND ELP.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BE'
  LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY   NCWP
  ON  ELP.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER = NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID  
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_ITEM  NRS
   ON EX.RCV_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID = NRS.SK_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID_INT 
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  = NRS.SS_CD
/* CHANGES AS PART OF TSP */
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION SRT
	ON SRT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = EX.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SRT.SS_CD
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
ON NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = EX.PO_LINE_ID
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NPOL.SS_CD

SELECT 
   SVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY AS  VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY,
   COALESCE(ST.CANCELLED_FLAG,'=') AS VENDOR_INV_LINE_CANCELLED_FLG,
   'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
   COALESCE(ST.QUANTITY_INVOICED,0) AS VENDOR_INV_LINE_QTY,
   COALESCE(ST.AMOUNT,0) AS VENDOR_INV_LINE_TRXL_AMT,
   ST.DESCRIPTION AS VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_DESCR,
   ST.LINE_NUMBER AS BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT,
   NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD,
   ST.INVOICE_ID AS SK_INVOICE_ID_INT,
   ST.LINE_NUMBER AS SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT,
   NVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY AS VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY,
   COALESCE(LINE_TYPE.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_TYPE_CD,
   COALESCE(LINE_SRC.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SRC_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SRC_TYPE_CD,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
   USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
   USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
/* CHANGES AS PART OF TSP */
COALESCE ( NRS.RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY,-99995)  AS RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(SRT.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY ,-995) AS RECIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY ,
COALESCE(NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-99995) AS PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
/* CHANGES AS PART OF TSP */
COALESCE(CAST(ST.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'), DATE '3500-01-01') AS POSTING_DT, /* pvenketa : 11/17/2014 Added as part of Q2FY15 Dec QWN */
ST.ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE

   
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_AP_INVOICE_LINES_ALL ST
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = ST.GLOBAL_NAME
	INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE NVI
    ON ST.INVOICE_ID=NVI.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT
    AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NVI.SS_CD
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE SVIL
    ON SVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT = ST.LINE_NUMBER
       AND SVIL.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT=ST.INVOICE_ID
        AND SVIL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SOURCE_TYPE LINE_SRC
    ON ST.LINE_SOURCE=LINE_SRC.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SRC_TYPE_CD
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_TYPE LINE_TYPE
    ON ST.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE =LINE_TYPE.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_TYPE_CD
/*INNER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ORDER BY OP_UNIT_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE  desc) =1) NCIO
ON NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = ST.ORG_ID*/
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_ITEM  NRS
   ON ST.RCV_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID = NRS.SK_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID_INT 
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  = NRS.SS_CD
/* CHANGES AS PART OF TSP */
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION SRT
	ON SRT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = ST.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SRT.SS_CD
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
ON NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = ST.PO_LINE_ID
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NPOL.SS_CD



UNION ALL
   SELECT 
   SVIL.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY AS  VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY,
   COALESCE(EX.CANCELLED_FLAG,'=') AS VENDOR_INV_LINE_CANCELLED_FLG,
   'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
   COALESCE(EX.QUANTITY_INVOICED,0) AS VENDOR_INV_LINE_QTY,
   COALESCE(EX.AMOUNT,0) AS VENDOR_INV_LINE_TRXL_AMT,
   EX.DESCRIPTION AS VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_DESCR,
   EX.LINE_NUMBER AS BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT,
   NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD,
   EX.INVOICE_ID AS SK_INVOICE_ID_INT,
   EX.LINE_NUMBER AS SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT,
   NVI.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY AS VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY,
   COALESCE(LINE_TYPE.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_TYPE_CD,
   COALESCE(LINE_SRC.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SRC_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SRC_TYPE_CD,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
   USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
   USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
/* CHANGES AS PART OF TSP */
COALESCE ( NRS.RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY,-99995)  AS RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(SRT.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY ,-995)  AS RECIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY ,
COALESCE(NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-99995) AS PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
/* CHANGES AS PART OF TSP */
COALESCE(CAST(EX.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD'),DATE '3500-01-01') AS POSTING_DT,/* pvenketa : 11/17/2014 Added as part of Q2FY15 Dec QWN */
EX.ACTION_CODE,
   'I' AS DML_TYPE

FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_AP_INVOICE_LINES_ALL EX
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EX.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE NVI
    ON EX.INVOICE_ID=NVI.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT
    AND NSSC. SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NVI.SS_CD
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE SVIL
    ON SVIL.SK_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_NUM_INT = EX.LINE_NUMBER
       AND SVIL.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT=EX.INVOICE_ID
        AND SVIL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SOURCE_TYPE LINE_SRC
    ON EX.LINE_SOURCE=LINE_SRC.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SRC_TYPE_CD
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_TYPE LINE_TYPE
    ON EX.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE =LINE_TYPE.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_TYPE_CD
/*INNER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ORDER BY OP_UNIT_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE  desc) =1) NCIO
ON NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = EX.ORG_ID*/
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_ITEM  NRS
   ON EX.RCV_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID = NRS.SK_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID_INT 
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  = NRS.SS_CD
/* CHANGES AS PART OF TSP */
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION SRT
	ON SRT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = EX.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SRT.SS_CD
	LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
ON NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = EX.PO_LINE_ID
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NPOL.SS_CD

SELECT 
SCAILA.INVOICE_ID, 
SCAILA.LINE_NUMBER, 
SCAILA.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE, 
SCAILA.ACCOUNTING_DATE, 
SCAILA.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, 
SCAILA.AMOUNT, 
SCAILA.WFAPPROVAL_STATUS, 
SCAILA.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
SCAILA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
SCAILA.REQUESTER_ID, 
SCAILA.DESCRIPTION, 
SCAILA.LINE_SOURCE, 
SCAILA.ORG_ID, 
SCAILA.LINE_GROUP_NUMBER, 
SCAILA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, 
SCAILA.ITEM_DESCRIPTION, 
SCAILA.SERIAL_NUMBER, 
SCAILA.MANUFACTURER, 
SCAILA.MODEL_NUMBER, 
SCAILA.WARRANTY_NUMBER, 
SCAILA.GENERATE_DISTS, 
SCAILA.MATCH_TYPE, 
SCAILA.DISTRIBUTION_SET_ID, 
SCAILA.ACCOUNT_SEGMENT, 
SCAILA.BALANCING_SEGMENT, 
SCAILA.COST_CENTER_SEGMENT, 
SCAILA.OVERLAY_DIST_CODE_CONCAT, 
SCAILA.DEFAULT_DIST_CCID, 
SCAILA.PRORATE_ACROSS_ALL_ITEMS, 
SCAILA.PERIOD_NAME, 
SCAILA.DEFERRED_ACCTG_FLAG, 
SCAILA.DEF_ACCTG_START_DATE, 
SCAILA.DEF_ACCTG_END_DATE,

SCAILA.AIL_INVOICE_ID2, 
SCAILA.AIL_DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER2,

SCAILA.GLOBAL_NAME, 
SCAILA.BATCH_ID, 
SCAILA.CREATE_DATETIME, 
SCAILA.ACTION_CODE, 
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_AP_INVOICE_LINES_ALL SCAILA
WHERE
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE NVI, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SCAILA.GLOBAL_NAME
AND NVI.SK_INVOICE_ID_INT=SCAILA.INVOICE_ID
AND NVI.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SOURCE_TYPE LINE_SRC
WHERE SCAILA.LINE_SOURCE=LINE_SRC.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_SRC_TYPE_CD)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_TYPE LINE_TYPE
WHERE SCAILA.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE =LINE_TYPE.BK_VENDOR_INV_LINE_TYPE_CD)
OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_RECEIPT_SHIPMENT_ITEM  NRSI,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE NRSI.SK_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID_INT = SCAILA.RCV_SHIPMENT_LINE_ID
AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SCAILA.GLOBAL_NAME
AND NRSI.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCIO
WHERE SCAILA.ORG_ID = NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
